summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed. All ID normalization (strip spaces, uppercase prefix, pass-through), definition reclassification (keyword detection, real provisions preserved, non-provision types unaffected), and figure shape repair (skipped_figure detection, valid figures preserved) behaviors confirmed working as specified.
